candidate_definitions.text: opam is a source-based package manager. It supports multiple simultaneous compiler installations, flexible package constraints, and a Git-friendly development workflow.
Main public package repository for opam, the source package manager of OCaml.
This repository contains OCaml package and compiler metadata and is used by the default installation of [opam](https://opam.ocaml.org/).
